text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, March 30. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Bedtime can be a challenge. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've noted the plans. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Prepping school lunches for the week. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Yum, that sounds delicious! Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: I've got the schedule covered. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Automations are great when they work. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. I can help troubleshoot that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
